steps.title: Write the line from one point and the slope
steps.content: The table is linear with slope $2$ and includes the point $(3,7)$. In Desmos, define the line $f(x)=2x+1$, since $2(3)+1=7$.

steps.title: Use a list to fill the missing table values
steps.content: The row with output $11$ must have input $5$, because $f(5)=11$. The row with input $12$ has output $25$, because $f(12)=25$. You can see both at once by entering $x_1=[3,5,12]$ and $f(x_1)=[7,11,25]$.
